design_philosophy.core_loop: Select team/player, execute hockey fundamentals (skating, passing, shooting, checking), manage line fatigue, compete across exhibition/season/playoff modes
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Real-time positional play and tactical decision-making (offensive vs defensive posturing, line management, goalie control) against adaptive AI opponents
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Control a professional NHL hockey team with authentic rosters, compete in realistic seasons and playoffs, master individual player skills and team strategy
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Emphasis on authentic NHL simulation with adjustable AI difficulty, manual goalie control option, toggleable fatigue/penalty systems, and player customization via Transactions mode. Allows players to define their own difficulty and simulation preferences rather than prescribing a single experience

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: High agency: players can adjust opponent AI to Rookie/Pro/All-Star, toggle penalties and fatigue systems, manually or auto-control goalie, and call timeouts to refresh stamina. Difficulty is fully customizable per session

progression.upgrade_system: Player roster customization via Transactions mode: create new players, trade existing roster members, sign free agents, release players. Line cycling and stamina management provides mid-game tactical progression
progression.unlock_mechanism: Rosters unlock via season play and award ceremonies. Transactions mode allows creation of up to 19 custom players and manipulation of free agent pool
replayability_hooks: Season mode with 84-game structure and dynamic awards
Shootout practice mode for penalty shot refinement
Customizable team rosters and player creation

world_building_techniques: Authentic 1994-95 NHL season rosters and team names

faction_indicators: Team selection (32 NHL franchises with distinct rosters)
danger_signals: Physical play (body checks, poke checks, hooking infractions)
Penalty box system for rule violations
environmental_storytelling: Real NHL arenas (implied through gameplay context)
Season progression with realistic game counts and playoff advancement
Goalie control mechanics reflecting position-specific gameplay
Line fatigue and timeouts mirroring real coaching strategy
